---
title: "Explore by topic"
subtitle: "Longforms and posts organized by shared subject areas."
description: "Browse longforms and posts by topic across the complete collection."
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
sidebar: false
listing:
  - id: topic_longforms
    contents: longforms
    page-size: 15
    sort: "date-modified desc"
    type: grid
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, reading-time, categories, description, author, date, date-modified, keywords]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    categories: true
    max-description-length: 500
    field-display-names:
      keywords: Keywords
  - id: topic_posts
    contents: posts
    page-size: 15
    sort: "date-modified desc"
    type: grid
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, reading-time, categories, description, author, date, date-modified]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    categories: false
    max-description-length: 500
---

## Longforms

> **Extended analysis in which technical, organizational and regulatory questions are developed with evidence, structure and sufficient depth.**

::: {#topic_longforms}
:::

<hr class="my-5">

## Posts

> **Shorter notes, explanations and observations arising from ongoing research and professional practice.**

::: {#topic_posts}
:::

<script>
(function () {
  const defaultTitle = "Explore by topic";

  const topicLabels = {
    "enterprise architecture": "Enterprise architecture",
    "digital transformation": "Digital transformation",
    "cybersecurity": "Cybersecurity",
    "machine learning": "Machine learning",
    "mathematics": "Mathematics",
    "energy": "Energy",
    "cryptography": "Cryptography",
    "quantum computing": "Quantum computing",
    "software development": "Software development"
  };

  function getSelectedTopic() {
    const hash = window.location.hash.replace(/^#/, "");
    const params = new URLSearchParams(hash);

    return (params.get("category") || "").trim();
  }

  function formatTopic(topic) {
    const normalized = topic.toLocaleLowerCase();

    if (topicLabels[normalized]) {
      return topicLabels[normalized];
    }

    return topic
      .split(/\s+/)
      .map(function (word) {
        return word.charAt(0).toLocaleUpperCase() + word.slice(1);
      })
      .join(" ");
  }

  function updatePageTitle() {
    const selectedTopic = getSelectedTopic();

    const visibleTitle = selectedTopic
      ? defaultTitle + ": " + formatTopic(selectedTopic)
      : defaultTitle;

    const titleElement = document.querySelector(
      "#title-block-header h1.title, .quarto-title-block h1.title, h1.title"
    );

    if (titleElement) {
      titleElement.textContent = defaultTitle;

      if (selectedTopic) {
        titleElement.append(": ");

        const topicSpan = document.createElement("span");
        topicSpan.textContent = formatTopic(selectedTopic);
        topicSpan.style.color = "#ffd700";

        titleElement.appendChild(topicSpan);
      }
    }

    document.title = visibleTitle + " | Random Bits of Knowledge";
  }

  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", updatePageTitle);
  } else {
    updatePageTitle();
  }

  window.addEventListener("hashchange", updatePageTitle);
})();
</script>
